title: tephrosia valleculata
intro: Tephrosia valleculata, also known as the small white prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia valleculata include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
